TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Cihafayan == Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Fungrincn ka alang Cihafayan. 101 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 221 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 183 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 38 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pusu nniqan alang Chihavaian, dungus na o "tnkuyan masu". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki Fungrin cng alang Sansingri. Gasuc Mniq hngari bi hraan hidaw Fungrin cng, gaga daya hari alang Sansingri hiya. Tiri lnglingay Sttu. Pgkla patas cyawtung Mgrig rulu: Taypey>kwotaw 1 haw>kwotaw 3 haw>Kwotaw 3 cya lutuc Taypey >elug wunsan>syeyn106>syeyn109>Peyyi kungru>Pinhay kungru>suhwa kungru>hwatung cungku dungru>elug cungsan>hwa39>hwa38-1>paru hakaw Mican>syeyn195>elug sansing>elug wunsan>Dhuq Klgan sjiqan nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang Tmhangan dha "Cawbi " uri ka alang Cihafayan, seejiq Amis o tmhangan "Chihavaian" ksun, dungus na o "tnkuyan masu". Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pgkla patas saan rmigaw klwaan kmlawa sapah Fungrin cng. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == ʦiħa*ajan == gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən *uŋɾinʦn ka alaŋ ʦiħa*ajan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tɾuku *%, tajal *%, bunun *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŋ ʦħiħa*aian, duŋus na o "tnkujan masu". nniqan alaŋ njusan skanki *uŋɾin ʦŋ alaŋ sansiŋɾi. gasuʦ mniq ħŋaɾi bi ħɾaan ħidaw *uŋɾin ʦŋ, gaga daja ħaɾi alaŋ sansiŋɾi ħija. tiɾi lŋliŋaj sttu. pgkla patas ʦjawtuŋ mgɾig ɾulu: tajpə>kwotaw * ħaw>kwotaw * ħaw>kwotaw * ʦja lutuʦ tajpə >əlug wunsan>sjən***>sjən***>pəji kuŋɾu>pinħaj kuŋɾu>suħwa kuŋɾu>ħwatuŋ ʦuŋku duŋɾu>əlug ʦuŋsan>ħwa**>ħwa**-*>paɾu ħakaw miʦan>sjən***>əlug sansiŋ>əlug wunsan>dħuq klgan sɟiqan nəalaŋ amis. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi amis ni tlu. snħijun ʦuŋʦjaw pnɾħulan ɟoɾo ni təənʦuʦjaw. pnaaħ alaŋ tmħaŋan dħa "ʦawbi " uɾi ka alaŋ ʦiħa*ajan, səəɟiq amis o tmħaŋan "ʦħiħa*aian" ksun, duŋus na o "tnkujan masu". pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw klwaan kmlawa sapaħ *uŋɾin ʦŋ. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: == Cihafayan == Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Fungrincn ka alang Cihafayan. 101 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 221 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 183 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 38 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pusu nniqan alang Chihavaian, dungus na o "tnkuyan masu". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki Fungrin cng alang Sansingri. Gasuc Mniq hngari bi hraan hidaw Fungrin cng, gaga daya hari alang Sansingri hiya. Tiri lnglingay Sttu. Pgkla patas cyawtung Mgrig rulu: Taypey>kwotaw 1 haw>kwotaw 3 haw>Kwotaw 3 cya lutuc Taypey >elug wunsan>syeyn106>syeyn109>Peyyi kungru>Pinhay kungru>suhwa kungru>hwatung cungku dungru>elug cungsan>hwa39>hwa38-1>paru hakaw Mican>syeyn195>elug sansing>elug wunsan>Dhuq Klgan sjiqan nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang Tmhangan dha "Cawbi " uri ka alang Cihafayan, seejiq Amis o tmhangan "Chihavaian" ksun, dungus na o "tnkuyan masu". Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pgkla patas saan rmigaw klwaan kmlawa sapah Fungrin cng. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == ʦiħa*ajan == gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən *uŋɾinʦn ka alaŋ ʦiħa*ajan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tɾuku *%, tajal *%, bunun *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŋ ʦħiħa*aian, duŋus na o "tnkujan masu". nniqan alaŋ njusan skanki *uŋɾin ʦŋ alaŋ sansiŋɾi. gasuʦ mniq ħŋaɾi bi ħɾaan ħidaw *uŋɾin ʦŋ, gaga daja ħaɾi alaŋ sansiŋɾi ħija. tiɾi lŋliŋaj sttu. pgkla patas ʦjawtuŋ mgɾig ɾulu: tajpə>kwotaw * ħaw>kwotaw * ħaw>kwotaw * ʦja lutuʦ tajpə >əlug wunsan>sjən***>sjən***>pəji kuŋɾu>pinħaj kuŋɾu>suħwa kuŋɾu>ħwatuŋ ʦuŋku duŋɾu>əlug ʦuŋsan>ħwa**>ħwa**-*>paɾu ħakaw miʦan>sjən***>əlug sansiŋ>əlug wunsan>dħuq klgan sɟiqan nəalaŋ amis. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi amis ni tlu. snħijun ʦuŋʦjaw pnɾħulan ɟoɾo ni təənʦuʦjaw. pnaaħ alaŋ tmħaŋan dħa "ʦawbi " uɾi ka alaŋ ʦiħa*ajan, səəɟiq amis o tmħaŋan "ʦħiħa*aian" ksun, duŋus na o "tnkujan masu". pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw klwaan kmlawa sapaħ *uŋɾin ʦŋ. pnjaħan pnatas
